title: Significant-Gravitas/AutoGPT

title: AI is just unauthorised plagiarism at a bigger scale
content: Article URL: https://axelk.ee/ai-is-just-unauthorised-plagiarism-at-a-bigger-scale/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48222383 Points: 788 # Comments: 689
summary: 文章认为AI本质上是大规模的未经授权的抄袭，因为它通过训练数据复制和重组人类创作的内容，缺乏原创性，并引发版权和伦理问题。
highlights: AI is just unauthorised plagiarism at a bigger scale
AI models are trained on human-created content without permission
The output is a remix of existing works, not genuine creation

title: Shunning AI is the human choice

highlights: Shunning AI is the human choice
hating AI is good actually
